title: The case of the murder of Tariel Mklavadze
actors: Kote Mikaberidze, Nato Vachnadze, Mikheil Kadagidze
plot: Schoolteacher Spiridon and his pretty wife Despine are taking a room in a small inn. Tariel Mklavadze, a local nobleman and debauchee falls for a beauty of Despine. He and his friends terrify young couple trying to get Despine.
